notes: All mutations target canonical dashboard documents, not raw YAML text.
The server derives dashboard file paths internally and never accepts file paths from clients.
Whole-dashboard patch operations use RFC 6902 JSON Patch constrained to /metadata and /views.
Cards are manipulated through typed card helpers rather than raw Lovelace card dictionaries.

tools.name: lovelace.list_dashboards
tools.description: List all YAML dashboards managed by the integration.

tools.name: lovelace.get_dashboard
tools.description: Get a canonical YAML dashboard document.

tools.name: lovelace.create_dashboard
tools.description: Create a new YAML dashboard using canonical metadata and optional initial views.

tools.name: lovelace.update_dashboard_metadata
tools.description: Update YAML dashboard metadata without changing view contents.

tools.name: lovelace.delete_dashboard
tools.description: Delete a YAML dashboard registration and managed document.

tools.name: lovelace.list_views
tools.description: List views for a YAML dashboard.

tools.name: lovelace.get_view
tools.description: Get a single dashboard view.

tools.name: lovelace.create_view
tools.description: Append or insert a typed Lovelace view into a YAML dashboard.

tools.name: lovelace.update_view
tools.description: Update a view's metadata and optionally reorder it.

tools.name: lovelace.delete_view
tools.description: Delete a view from a YAML dashboard.

tools.name: lovelace.list_cards
tools.description: List typed cards for a dashboard view.

tools.name: lovelace.get_card
tools.description: Get a single typed card from a view.

tools.name: lovelace.create_card
tools.description: Append or insert a typed card into a view.

tools.name: lovelace.update_card
tools.description: Replace an existing card with a typed helper card definition.

tools.name: lovelace.delete_card
tools.description: Delete a card from a view.

tools.name: lovelace.patch_dashboard
tools.description: Apply RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations against the canonical dashboard document.

tools.name: lovelace.validate_dashboard
tools.description: Validate either a candidate dashboard document or a JSON Patch request before mutation.

tools.name: hass.list_entities
tools.description: List Home Assistant entities with optional domain and area filters for dashboard discovery.

tools.name: hass.search_entities
tools.description: Search Home Assistant entities by query with optional domain, area, and device-class filters.

tools.name: hass.list_services
tools.description: List registered Home Assistant services with an optional domain filter.

tools.name: hass.list_areas
tools.description: List configured Home Assistant areas for dashboard grouping.

tools.name: hass.list_devices
tools.description: List Home Assistant devices with an optional area filter.

tools.name: hass.list_lovelace_dashboards
tools.description: List native Home Assistant Lovelace dashboards outside the MCP-managed repository.

tools.name: hass.list_frontend_panels
tools.description: List Home Assistant frontend panels visible to the authenticated user, including built-in, custom, and Lovelace-backed panels.

tools.name: hass.get_lovelace_dashboard
tools.description: Return one native Home Assistant Lovelace dashboard by url_path.

tools.name: hass.create_lovelace_dashboard
tools.description: Create a new storage-mode Home Assistant Lovelace dashboard and optionally save its initial config.

tools.name: hass.update_lovelace_dashboard_metadata
tools.description: Update metadata for one storage-mode Home Assistant Lovelace dashboard.

tools.name: hass.save_lovelace_dashboard_config
tools.description: Replace the config for one storage-mode Home Assistant Lovelace dashboard.

tools.name: hass.delete_lovelace_dashboard
tools.description: Delete one storage-mode Home Assistant Lovelace dashboard by url_path.

tools.name: hass.list_lovelace_resources
tools.description: List Home Assistant Lovelace frontend resources in either storage or YAML mode.

tools.name: hass.get_lovelace_resource
tools.description: Return one Home Assistant Lovelace resource by resource identifier.

tools.name: hass.get_frontend_panel
tools.description: Return one Home Assistant frontend panel visible to the authenticated user by url_path.
